boxes.label: algorithm
boxes.text:
input: pre-trained DM sp(t) , generator gθ, prior distribution pz, DM sφ; forward diffusion (2.1).
hile not converge do
update φ using SGD with gradient
′T
∂
Grad(φ) =
w(t)E z∼pz,x0=gθ(z) | sφ(xt,t) − xtlogpt(xt|x0)2dt.
∂φJt=0
xt |x0 ∼pt (xt |x0)
update θ using SGD with the gradient
cT
∂xt
Grad(θ) =
w(t)E z∼pz,x0=gθ(z),
[sφ(xt,t) − sp(t)(xt)]
dt.
∂θ
Jt=0
xt |x0 ∼pt (xt |x0)
d
